Interface IPlatformWindow

Namespace
FluentGpu.Pal
Assembly
FluentGpu.Pal.dll
public interface IPlatformWindow : IDisposable
Inherited Members
IDisposable.Dispose()

Properties

ClientOriginPx

The screen position of the client area's (0,0), in physical virtual-screen px — the window-DIP → screen-px bridge for popup-window placement and per-monitor work-area queries (Win32 ClientToScreen; headless: settable, default (0,0)).

Point2 ClientOriginPx { get; }

Property Value

Point2

ClientSizePx 

Size2 ClientSizePx { get; }

Property Value

Size2

Handle 

NativeHandle Handle { get; }

Property Value

NativeHandle

IsActive

True while the window has activation (drives titlebar dimming). Change is signaled via the existing WindowFocus/WindowBlur events; this property is the pull side.

bool IsActive { get; }

Property Value

bool

PaintRequested

Invoked by the platform when the OS demands an immediate repaint outside the app's frame loop — notably during the modal move/size loop (WM_SIZE/WM_PAINT), which otherwise blocks rendering until mouse-up. The host wires this to a pump-free paint so the window stays live during a live resize.

Action? PaintRequested { get; set; }

Property Value

Action

Scale 

float Scale { get; }

Property Value

float

State

Current placement (drives the custom max↔restore glyph). Change is signaled via WindowStateChanged; this property is the pull side.

WindowState State { get; }

Property Value

WindowState

TextInput

The per-window IME/text-services seam (composition events, candidate-window placement).

IPlatformTextInput TextInput { get; }

Property Value

IPlatformTextInput

Methods

CloseWindow() 

void CloseWindow()

Minimize()

Engine caption-button commands (Win32: WM_SYSCOMMAND SC_MINIMIZE / SC_MAXIMIZE↔SC_RESTORE / WM_CLOSE).

void Minimize()

PumpInto(InputEventRing)

Drain queued OS input/window events into the ring (once per frame).

int PumpInto(InputEventRing ring)

Parameters

ring InputEventRing

Returns

int

SetCursor(CursorId) 

void SetCursor(CursorId id)

Parameters

id CursorId

SetTitle(StringId) 

void SetTitle(StringId title)

Parameters

title StringId

SetTitleBarRegions(ReadOnlySpan<TitleBarRegion>)

Push the titlebar's drag/caption-button regions (CLIENT DIP; see TitleBarRegion). The engine calls this only when the titlebar relayouts — push-on-change, never per frame (zero-alloc steady path). Anything not covered stays HTCLIENT (the bar's interactive content). An empty span clears all regions.

void SetTitleBarRegions(ReadOnlySpan<TitleBarRegion> regions)

Parameters

regions ReadOnlySpan<TitleBarRegion>

Show() 

void Show()

ToggleMaximize() 

void ToggleMaximize()

WaitForWork(int)

Block until platform work arrives or timeoutMs elapses. Negative timeout means wait indefinitely. Real windows use this for event-driven idle; headless implementations may return immediately.

void WaitForWork(int timeoutMs)

Parameters

timeoutMs int
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
